title: derris pseudomarginata
intro: Derris pseudomarginata, also known as the Derris plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Derris pseudomarginata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
